# Novyx Vault

> Markdown knowledge vault with persistent memory that learns your thinking patterns.

Novyx Vault is a markdown-first note-taking app where AI gets smarter the longer you use it. Built by Novyx Labs.

## What is Novyx Vault?

Novyx Vault is an open-source personal knowledge management application that combines wiki-style note-linking with persistent AI memory powered by the Novyx SDK. Unlike other AI note apps, the AI in Novyx Vault remembers your notes, preferences, and thinking patterns across every session.

## Key Features

- Persistent AI Memory: AI remembers your notes, preferences, and thinking patterns across sessions
- Wiki-Style Linking: Connect ideas with [[wiki-links]] and visualize your knowledge graph
- Ghost Connections: AI automatically discovers hidden relationships between your notes
- Knowledge Graph: Interactive force-directed graph visualization of your entire vault
- Multi-Provider AI: Bring your own key — OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, and many OpenAI-compatible providers
- Desktop-Local Storage: Your files can live on your device; cloud mode uses your Supabase-backed account
- Memory Rollback: Travel back through your AI's memory timeline and restore previous states
- Cortex Insights: AI generates emerging themes from your accumulated knowledge
- Entity Extraction: People, projects, and concepts are extracted to build a semantic graph
- Brain Dump: Convert raw thoughts into structured notes
- Clip Remix: Rewrite external content in your personal voice
- Cloud Mode: Optional Supabase-powered hosted access with row-level security

## Tech Stack

- Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- CodeMirror 6 editor
- Novyx SDK for persistent AI memory
- Supabase for cloud storage and authentication
- Tauri for desktop apps (macOS, Windows, Linux)
